title: Savita Puthigai
compiled_truth: Savita Puthigai is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-24 to 2001-12-03), Savita Puthigai sent 79 and received 485 emails, totalling 564 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (19), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (13), [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (11), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (11), [Brad Richter](people/brad-richter) (10).
